Built for hotels, hostels and serviced stays in Thailand

Scan passports in seconds and simplify your TM30 reporting workflow.

TM30 Flow helps your front desk capture guest passport details instantly at check-in, then export the daily Excel file for immigration. Less manual typing, fewer mistakes, and a faster routine for your team.

Book a WhatsApp demo See how it works
  • Speed up check-in and reduce repetitive typing
  • Make daily TM30 preparation easier for your staff
  • Reduce the risk of missed submissions and costly mistakes
Passport scanned Guest details captured instantly Name, passport number, nationality and stay details
2 min Typical time saved on every check-in
Fewer errors and lower compliance risk for your team
600+ guest records per month on the starter plan
1 scan to capture passport details at check-in
Daily Excel ready for your immigration upload workflow
The real cost of doing it manually

Manual TM30 work slows the front desk and creates avoidable risk.

Your reception team already handles arrivals, payments and guest requests. Adding manual passport entry on top of that wastes time, increases pressure and makes mistakes more likely.

01

Check-in takes longer than it should

Staff spend valuable minutes copying passport details instead of focusing on guests and operations.

02

Errors happen when the desk gets busy

Typos and incomplete records create extra work later when it is time to prepare your daily TM30 submission.

03

Late or inconsistent reporting can cost you

When reporting is handled manually, delays and missed steps can lead to fines and unnecessary stress.

A simple workflow for your team

Designed for the way hotels and hostels in Thailand already operate.

No complicated setup. Staff scan the passport during check-in, then export the daily Excel file when it is time to submit on the immigration website.

1

Scan at check-in

Use the mobile app to scan the passport and capture the required guest details in seconds.

2

Export the daily file

Guest data is organized for you, so staff can download the Excel file without manual copy and paste.

3

Submit faster

Upload the Excel file to the immigration portal and complete the daily TM30 process with less friction.

From slow manual work to a faster daily routine

Make the value clear in seconds.

This section shows the shift from manual passport typing to a faster, cleaner reporting flow your staff can follow every day.

Why it sells

Show the difference between manual work and a faster routine.

In a few scrolls, the section makes the problem clear and shows how the product helps hotels and hostels in Thailand save time every day.

01

Manual passport entry slows down check-in

When staff have to type every passport detail by hand, lines move slower and the front desk feels more pressure.

02

Scan once and capture the guest data instantly

Your team uses the app at check-in to capture the details in seconds, without repetitive manual entry.

03

Export the daily file and complete TM30 faster

At the end of the day, download the Excel file and finish your reporting workflow with less friction and less risk.
